title: Add native LCI location injection endpoint
description: Why this exists: project-LICHEN-zte2.4 added the shared app-interface-to-HAL bridge for local-client location samples, but the gateway local-client CoAP surface still only accepts text/status inbound resources. What needs to be done: add a no-hardware-testable local-client location POST path beside gateway_inbound_text_post() and gateway_inbound_status_post(), parse the compact app location payload into lichen_app_location_time_snapshot, call lichen_app_location_submit_to_hal(), and verify the submitted fix through lichen_hal_location_time_snapshot_get().
